headline: How The NMI Holdings (NMIH) Investment Story Is Shifting With Cautious Analyst Optimism
summary: NMI Holdings’ fair value estimate sits at US$46.29, with the latest update keeping that target unchanged even as underlying assumptions are refined. Street research around the name currently blends optimism and caution, with some analysts lifting price targets toward the low to mid US$40s while maintaining more neutral ratings as they weigh sector level policy and credit risks. As you read on, you will see how these shifting calls fit together and how you can track the evolving narrative...

headline: JPMorgan Chase, others sued in alleged Orlando crypto Ponzi scheme case
summary: Three class-action lawsuits, including one against banking giant JPMorgan Chase, have been filed in connection with the massive cryptocurrency Ponzi scheme prosecutors say Christopher Delgado ran from his Orlando headquarters. The recently filed lawsuits come on the heels of the Feb. 24 arrest of Delgado, 34, Goliath Ventures’ founder and former CEO. Federal authorities say Goliath Ventures ...

headline: JPMorgan Makes Bold Push to Offload Huge LBO Debt
summary: Now, his bank is about to test investors’ appetites.  JPMorgan Chase & Co. is gearing up to help issuers sell billions of dollars in junk bonds and leveraged loans, with deals to fund the buyouts of Electronic Arts Inc. and Sealed Air Corp. poised to start next week.  More merger and acquisition-driven transactions are in the works, including one for software firm Qualtrics International Inc. Those offerings alone total more than $30 billion in debt.
